title: 📜 Quest System Guide
footer: Veyra • Quests Help • Tip: Open /quest often

pages.title: 📜 Quests Overview
pages.description:
Think of quests as little side missions Veyra throws at you to keep life interesting. Open `/quest` to see what she wants, how close you are, and what shiny reward is waiting at the end.

The loop is simple:
• Get a quest
• Do the thing it asks for
• Finish the target
• Claim your reward
• Come back for the next one

fields.name: Main Command
fields.value:
• `/quest` - Opens your current quest screen

That screen changes depending on your quest state, so it will show the right button when you need it.

fields.name: How It Works
fields.value: Your quest only moves when you do what it asks. If Veyra wants battle wins, go fight. If she wants gold spent, go burn your wallet a little.

pages.title: 🧩 What Kinds Of Quests Exist?
pages.description: Quests can come from a bunch of different playstyles, so whether you love fighting, gambling, crafting, or shopping badly, there is probably a quest for it.

fields.name: Combat
fields.value:
These are for the violent little achievers:
• Win battles
• Build a win streak
• Push campaign stages

fields.name: Economy & Market
fields.value:
These focus on your wallet and marketplace habits:
• Earn gold
• Spend gold
• Sell items
• Buy items

fields.name: Crafting & Activity
fields.value:
These reward active grinding and side systems:
• Smelt bars
• Brew potions
• Open lootboxes
• Complete jobs
• Play casino games

pages.title: 📈 How Progress Builds
pages.description: The nice part? You do not need to babysit the quest screen. Just play normally and progress updates on its own when you do the right actions.

fields.name: Some Quests Count Actions
fields.value: Things like jobs, lootboxes, and casino plays usually go up one step at a time.

fields.name: Some Quests Count Amounts
fields.value: Gold and quantity-based quests can jump faster. Spend more gold, buy more items, smelt more bars, and progress can move in bigger chunks.

fields.name: Watch The Streak Ones
fields.value: Win streak quests are mean on purpose. If you lose, the streak breaks. Veyra believes in pressure apparently.

pages.title: 🎁 Rewards & Claiming
pages.description: Finishing the quest is only half the fun. The other half is pressing the button and getting paid.

fields.name: When You Finish
fields.value: Once you hit the target, your quest is marked complete. Open `/quest` and you will see a `Claim Reward` button waiting for you.

fields.name: What You Can Get
fields.value:
Quest rewards can include:
• Gold
• XP
• Items like lootboxes or materials

fields.name: Important
fields.value: Rewards are claimed through the quest screen. So if you finished something and nothing popped into chat, just open `/quest` and press the button.

pages.title: ⏳ Expiry, Skip, and New Quest
pages.description: Veyra does not hand out infinite patience. Quests are timed, skippable, and replaceable depending on how badly you fumble them.

fields.name: Expiry
fields.value: Active quests show a live timer, so you can see exactly how long you have left. If time runs out, `/quest` will show the expired quest and how far you got.

fields.name: Skip Cost
fields.value: Do not like the quest? Fine. Skipping costs **88 gold**. If you are broke, Veyra will absolutely make that your problem.

fields.name: Get New Quest
fields.value: If your quest expires, you can grab a fresh one right from the expired screen using the `Get New Quest` button.

pages.title: 🧠 How To Not Throw Your Quest
pages.description: If you want to clear quests faster, stop playing on autopilot and actually read what Veyra asked for.

fields.name: 1) Match Your Actions
fields.value: A battle quest wants fighting. A spending quest wants gold to disappear. A lootbox quest wants boxes opened. Obvious? Yes. Ignored constantly? Also yes.

fields.name: 2) Go For Bigger Chunks
fields.value: Amount-based quests move faster when you do bigger actions. Spending 500 gold in one go feels a lot better than crawling there 20 at a time.

fields.name: 3) Claim Fast, Move On
fields.value: Once a quest is done, claim it and get back in the loop. Sitting on a finished quest is just free progress you are refusing to take.
